description_long: This object is a large, multi-engine airplane with a robust fuselage and a high-mounted straight wing configuration. The main body is predominantly dark gray, with four prominent engines mounted under the wings, suggesting a heavy transport or cargo aircraft. The nose is rounded and features a cockpit with multiple windows, while the tail section is elevated with a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear. The airplane is accompanied by several smaller aircraft models in various colors, but the primary focus is the large, central airplane.
description: A large, dark gray multi-engine airplane with high-mounted straight wings, a rounded nose, and a conventional tail, designed for heavy transport or cargo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, four underwing engines, and high-mounted wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, high wing placement, and elevated tail section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the back of the engines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with emphasis on the tail and wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows.
